author: Star_OKX
text:
I have no interest in revisiting these old disputes with CZ, but his book filled with falsehoods has dragged me into this for no reason.

He has a long-standing habit of making misleading statements to the public, the media, and the world. Unfortunately, this tendency to distort the truth does not seem to change.

According to reporting by CoinDesk, his wife submitted a letter of support to the judge. In the report, she consistently referred to them as “husband” and “wife,” without using terms like “ex-wife” or “ex-husband.” (I have great respect for her loyalty and resilience.)

However, in his own book and media interviews, he has been deliberately vague about his marital status — at times saying they are separated, at times suggesting they are divorced. So what is the actual situation? Did the divorce happen after his release?

If they are indeed divorced, was his stake in Binance properly divided in accordance with the law? This is not only a legal matter, but also a question of basic moral responsibility and integrity as a husband. Figures like Jeff Bezos and Bill Gates both followed legal processes to divide assets with their spouses during their divorces.
